completed_tasks.name: comprehensive test suite expansion (192 tests, 86% coverage)

decisions.decision: ensemble uses simple average of LexRank+TextRank score vectors (no normalization)
decisions.rationale: both algorithms produce stationary distributions via power iteration that sum to ~1, so simple element-wise average is valid

decisions.decision: --rouge flag reads reference file, prints ROUGE-1/2/L scores to stderr, never affects stdout
decisions.rationale: consistent with existing stats/explain/verbose approach — stdout must remain pipe-safe

decisions.decision: subprocess coverage via go build -cover + GOCOVERDIR (two-pass Makefile)
decisions.rationale: -coverprofile flag interferes with GOCOVERDIR subprocess collection; two passes required: unit coverage first, then subprocess binary coverage

decisions.decision: removed dead code: ngramF1 sysTotal==0 check, custom max() helper in rouge.go
decisions.rationale: sysTotal==0 is unreachable (if ngramCounts returns non-empty, len(sys)>=n so sysTotal>=1); Go 1.26 has builtin max

next_action: v3 work: AI assistant skill integration, compression levels, or auto-trigger on long pastes — see .planning/STATE.md deferred items
context_notes: Project v1.0 milestone 100% complete. 192 tests, 86% unit coverage (all packages except main() entry point at near-100%). Two irreducible coverage gaps: main() itself (Go tooling limitation — covered via subprocess at 85.7%) and io.ReadAll(stdin) error path (practically unreachable). README covers all features including ensemble and ROUGE. Deferred v2/v3 items logged in STATE.md.
